welcome.title: Welcome to Sito Wallet
welcome.body: Your personal assistant to organize your money, save more, and make smarter financial decisions.

entities.title: Choose your functionalities
entities.body: Enable only the areas you want to use now.

transactions.description: Income, expenses, and categories to track your activity.

errors.empty: Select at least one entity to continue.

currencies.title: Manage your currencies
currencies.body: Add and track any currency to keep control of your finances anywhere in the world.

accounts.title: All your accounts in One Place
accounts.body: Record bank accounts, cash, or cryptocurrencies and get a complete view of your money.

transactions.title: Full control of your Transactions
transactions.body: Log income and expenses in seconds, and categorize them to know exactly where your money goes.

subscriptions.title: Keep your subscriptions under control
subscriptions.body: Organize recurring payments, providers, and renewals so every charge is predictable.

debts.title: Track your debts with clarity
debts.body: Record what you owe or what others owe you, monitor due dates, and keep the remaining balance visible.

get_started.title: You're Ready to Take Control
get_started.body: Add your first account now and start your journey to healthier finances today.

currencies.title: Start with your main currency or load your currencies from a file.
currencies.description: You can create your first currency right here or reuse a previous export.

accounts.title: Set up your first account without leaving onboarding.
accounts.description: Create one account manually or import several at once to get started faster.

transactions.title: Prepare your base categories or bring in your history directly.
transactions.description: This leaves your initial setup ready before you start entering transactions by hand.

subscriptions.title: Set up your subscription providers.
subscriptions.description: Create a provider or import your catalog before adding recurring payments.

dialog.title: Reset user?
dialog.description: This wipes accounts, transactions, categories, currencies, dashboard, subscriptions, sync sessions and refresh tokens for {{user}}. The user row (email, password, admin flag) is preserved and the profile is reset to defaults.
dialog.hardHint: Permanently deletes rows from the database. Cannot be undone. Type the username to confirm hard reset
dialog.softHint: Marks rows as deleted (recoverable by clearing deletedAt).

about.title: About Sito Wallet
about.body:
At Sito Wallet, we believe managing your money should be easy and stress-free. That's why we offer an app where you can manage all your accounts, both digital and physical, in one place.

Created with care by <2>sito8943, our mission is to help you understand and organize your finances clearly, safely, and without complications.

And the best part: it's completely free. It is also an open-source project and does not operate with real money: it only records and organizes the information you enter.

howTo.title: What you can do
howTo.body: With Sito Wallet, you have everything you need to fully control your finances, both digital and physical, thanks to its simple and powerful tools.

steps.title: Currencies
items: Edit their details when values change or if you want to update their name or symbol.
Delete the ones you no longer use to keep your app clean.
View all your currencies in one place to know which currencies you are using.

steps.title: Accounts
items: Add physical accounts (cash, banks) or digital accounts (PayPal, cryptocurrencies).
Modify details such as initial balance, name, or account type.
View and organize all your accounts clearly.

steps.title: Transaction Categories
items: Create categories to organize your income and expenses (e.g., Food, Freelance Work).
Edit names and descriptions to match your way of classifying transactions.
List all categories to have an organized view of your finances.

steps.title: Transactions
items: Record income and expenses with all details (date, amount, category, account).
Edit transactions if you made a mistake or want to update information.
Check your history to analyze how and where your money is moving.

legal.title: Legal and Transparency Information
legal.body: Before using the app, review these pages to understand the terms, privacy details, and storage technology usage. Sito Wallet is free, open source, and does not handle real money.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.body:
By accessing or using Sito Wallet, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, you must stop using the app.

Sito Wallet is completely free, open source, and does not operate with real money.

Last updated: March 29, 2026.

sections.title: 1. Service identification
sections.body:
• Service: Sito Wallet.
  • Project owner/controller: sito8943.
  • General contact: https://sito8943.com.
  • Tax or corporate details: these will be published when legally required for the applicable operating model.

sections.title: 2. Service purpose
sections.body: Sito Wallet provides features to record and organize personal finances, including accounts, currencies, categories, and transactions, with offline support and synchronization. The app does not hold funds, does not execute payments, and does not connect to bank accounts to move real money.

sections.title: 3. Registration, account, and access
sections.body:
• You are responsible for safeguarding your credentials and all activity performed through your account.
  • You must provide accurate data and keep it updated.
  • Guest mode may have limitations compared to authenticated access.

sections.title: 4. Allowed and prohibited use
sections.body:
• You may only use the app for lawful purposes and in compliance with these terms.
  • You must not use the app for fraud, unlawful activity, impersonation, or third-party rights violations.
  • You must not attempt to alter, degrade, or compromise service security or availability.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual property
sections.body: The code, design, brand, texts, and other Sito Wallet assets are protected by applicable intellectual and industrial property laws. Unless expressly authorized, reproduction, distribution, transformation, or exploitation is not permitted.

sections.title: 6. Privacy and cookies
sections.body: Personal data processing is governed by the Privacy Policy. The use of cookies and similar technologies is described in the Cookies Policy.

sections.title: 7. Availability, maintenance, and changes
sections.body:
• We aim to keep the service continuously available, but interruptions may occur due to maintenance, technical incidents, or external causes.
  • We may modify features, structure, or content to improve the service or comply with technical, legal, or security requirements.
  • Updated versions of these terms become effective once published in the app.

sections.title: 8. Warranty disclaimer and limitation of liability
sections.body: The app is provided as is and as available. We do not guarantee full absence of bugs or downtime. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect damages, lost profits, or financial decisions made by users based on app records.

sections.title: 9. Suspension or termination
sections.body: We may suspend or limit access in case of misuse, breach of these terms, or risk to service security or third parties.

sections.title: 10. Governing law and jurisdiction
sections.body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. Where legally allowed, disputes will be submitted to the courts of the service owner's domicile, without prejudice to consumer rights under applicable law.

sections.title: 11. Contact
sections.body: For questions about these terms, use the contact channel published at https://sito8943.com.

cookiesPolicy.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies Policy
cookiesPolicy.body:
This policy explains how Sito Wallet uses cookies and local storage/access technologies on user devices, in line with Article 22.2 LSSI and applicable privacy regulations.

Sito Wallet is completely free, open source, and does not operate with real money.

Last updated: March 29, 2026.

sections.title: 1. What cookies and similar technologies are
sections.body: Beyond HTTP cookies, the app may use mechanisms such as localStorage and IndexedDB to store technical and operational information required for sessions, preferences, and offline functionality.

sections.title: 2. Technologies used in this app
sections.body:
• Technical cookies related to client session/base libraries.
  • Local Storage for session data, preferences, recent searches, feature flags, and sync metadata.
  • IndexedDB for local financial data persistence and offline synchronization queues.

sections.title: 3. Purposes
sections.body:
• Authentication and session continuity.
  • Remember essential user preferences.
  • Enable offline mode and deferred synchronization.
  • Improve technical stability and disconnection recovery.

sections.title: 4. Legal basis
sections.body: Technologies strictly necessary to provide the service explicitly requested by the user rely on the Article 22.2 LSSI exemption. If non-essential technologies are introduced in the future (for example, non-exempt analytics or advertising), prior consent will be requested before activation.

sections.title: 5. First-party and third-party cookies
sections.body: At this time, behavioral advertising cookies are not enabled by default in this frontend. If third parties are integrated for non-exempt purposes, they will be explicitly listed in this policy (owner, purpose, duration, and related transfers).

sections.title: 6. Retention
sections.body: Retention depends on purpose: some data lasts until sign-out, some until manual deletion by the user or browser/app cleanup, and some while needed for synchronization and technical security.

sections.title: 7. Management and withdrawal
sections.body:
• You can clear or block cookies and local storage through your browser settings.
  • When non-essential categories exist, the app will provide a preferences panel with equivalent accept/reject and revocation options at any time.
  • Withdrawing consent will be as easy as granting it.

sections.title: 8. More information
sections.body: For further details on personal data processing, see the Privacy Policy.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.body:
This policy describes how we process personal data in Sito Wallet and the rights available to users.

Sito Wallet is completely free, open source, and does not operate with real money.

Last updated: March 29, 2026.

sections.title: 1. Data controller
sections.body:
• Controller: sito8943 (Sito Wallet).
  • General contact: https://sito8943.com.
  • Privacy contact: contact channel published on the official website.

sections.title: 2. Categories of data processed
sections.body:
• Account and identification data (username, email, internal identifiers).
  • Profile data (display name, description, optional photo).
  • Financial data entered by users (accounts, balances, categories, transactions).
  • Session and synchronization technical data (tokens, device/sync metadata, connectivity status).
  • Locally stored usage preferences (language, onboarding, filters, recent searches, interface settings).

sections.title: 3. Purposes and legal bases
sections.body:
• Provide core service: performance of the user relationship/terms.
  • Authentication and security: legitimate interest in protecting accounts and preventing unauthorized access.
  • Persistence and offline functionality: performance of the service requested by the user.
  • Technical support and stability improvements: legitimate interest in service continuity and quality.
  • Regulatory compliance: when required by applicable law.
  • Important: the app is only for record-keeping and organization; it does not execute real financial operations or hold money.

sections.title: 4. Data sources
sections.body:
• Data provided directly by users during registration or feature usage.
  • Data generated through technical app usage (for example, synchronization status and local storage behavior).

sections.title: 5. Recipients and processors
sections.body: We do not sell personal financial data. Data may be processed by technology providers acting as processors for hosting, API communications, storage, or infrastructure support, under contracts and appropriate safeguards.

sections.title: 6. International transfers
sections.body: If any provider processes data outside the European Economic Area, appropriate safeguards will be applied in accordance with applicable law (for example, Standard Contractual Clauses or other valid mechanisms).

sections.title: 7. Retention periods
sections.body:
• Account and profile data: while the account remains active or until a valid erasure request, unless legal retention is required.
  • User-created financial data: until user deletion or account closure, with possible temporary backup retention.
  • Technical/sync metadata: for the period required for operational integrity, incident resolution, and service continuity.
  • Browser-local data: until sign-out, browser cleanup, or manual user deletion, depending on data type.

sections.title: 8. User rights
sections.body: You may exercise rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, and portability where applicable. Use the service contact channel and clearly specify your request. Additional information may be required to verify identity when necessary.

sections.title: 9. Supervisory authority complaint
sections.body: If you believe processing does not comply with applicable law, you may file a complaint with the competent supervisory authority. In Spain, the reference authority is the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD): https://www.aepd.es.

sections.title: 10. Security
sections.body: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, loss, or destruction. No system is fully infallible, but we continuously review and improve safeguards.

sections.title: 11. Minors
sections.body: The app is not intentionally designed for unsupervised use by minors. If you detect inappropriate processing of minors' data, contact us for review and, where appropriate, deletion.

sections.title: 12. Changes to this policy
sections.body: We may update this policy to reflect legal, technical, or functional changes. The current version will remain published on this page with its update date.

seo.defaultDescription: Personal finance app to manage accounts, transactions, subscriptions, and currencies with offline support and sync.

home.description: Sito Wallet dashboard to review accounts, balances, transactions, and subscriptions from one place.

transactions.description: Track income and expenses to understand how your money moves day by day.

transactionCategories.description: Organize income and expense categories so every transaction stays clearly classified.

subscriptions.description: Manage recurring payments, renewal dates, and ongoing costs from a single view.

subscriptionNew.title: New subscription
subscriptionNew.description: Create a new subscription and define its amount, renewal cycle, and provider.

subscriptionEdit.title: Edit subscription
subscriptionEdit.description: Update an existing subscription to keep dates, amounts, and status in sync.

subscriptionProviders.description: Manage the providers linked to your subscriptions and reuse them in recurring payments.

accounts.description: Review and organize bank accounts, cash, and digital wallets inside Sito Wallet.

currencies.description: Manage currencies and prepare the app to work with multiple money formats.

profile.description: Update your profile, language, and personal preferences in Sito Wallet.

users.description: Manage users and reset data from the Sito Wallet administration area.

about.description: Learn about Sito Wallet, a free open-source app to organize personal finances without handling real money.

cookiesPolicy.description: See how Sito Wallet uses cookies, localStorage, and IndexedDB for sessions, preferences, and offline usage.

privacyPolicy.description: Review how Sito Wallet processes personal data, the legal basis used, and the rights available to users.

termsAndConditions.description: Read the Sito Wallet terms of use, including service scope, responsibility, and applicable law.

signIn.description: Sign in to Sito Wallet to organize your personal finances from any device.

signUp.description: Create your Sito Wallet account and start organizing accounts, transactions, and subscriptions.

recovery.description: Recover access to your Sito Wallet account if you forgot your password or need a new confirmation email.

updatePassword.description: Set a new password to regain access to your Sito Wallet account.

confirmEmailSuccess.description: Your email has been confirmed successfully and you can now sign in to Sito Wallet.

confirmEmailError.description: The confirmation link is invalid or expired. Request a new one to activate your account.
